name: Sea Comm
description_short: SeaComm Federal Credit Union is a member-owned financial institution offering checking, savings, credit cards, and lending products with 24/7 digital access through mobile and online banking.
description_long:
SeaComm Federal Credit Union operates as a not-for-profit, member-owned financial cooperative regulated by the NCUA (National Credit Union Administration). The institution provides traditional credit union services including deposit accounts, lending products, and digital banking solutions to its membership base. The organization maintains a physical web presence at seacomm.org and offers multiple channels for member access and support.

SeaComm's service portfolio includes checking and savings accounts, share certificates, Visa Platinum credit cards with online account management through eZCardInfo, digital banking via their Access Digital app and website, check ordering services, and insurance products through partnerships. The credit union emphasizes digital-first banking with 24/7 account access capabilities and real-time alert functionality for cardholders. Members can analyze spending, review statements, pay bills online, and manage accounts remotely through their technology platforms.

The institution differentiates itself through its DrivingSense program (details not fully specified on homepage), partnership with TruStage for insurance products, and emphasis on member security features including Visa Secure Remote Commerce at no additional cost. SeaComm operates a toll-free customer service line (800-764-0566) and local support (315-764-0566), suggesting a regional presence with accessibility across multiple states.

A significant caveat exists: as of the March 2, 2026 alert on their homepage, SeaComm is experiencing intermittent availability for online and mobile app account access. This active service disruption is a material consideration for prospective members relying on digital banking. The website content is limited to service highlights and technical information, lacking comprehensive details about membership eligibility, account fees, interest rates, loan products, or competitive positioning within the credit union sector.
services: Visa Platinum credit cards with online account access
Access Digital mobile app for 24/7 account management
eZCardInfo online credit card account management
Visa Secure Remote Commerce (online purchase security)
pros: 24/7 digital account access through Access Digital app and online banking portal
No additional charge for Visa Secure Remote Commerce (online purchase security feature)
Real-time customizable alerts for credit card accounts
Toll-free customer service line (800-764-0566) with local support option
Partnership with TruStage for member insurance protection products
Online bill pay and statement review capabilities through eZCardInfo platform
Member-owned cooperative structure with NCUA insurance protection
cons: Active service disruption: intermittent availability for online and mobile app access as of March 2, 2026
Limited public information on membership eligibility requirements, fee structures, and APRs on website
Reliance on third-party platforms (eZCardInfo, OrderMyChecks) for account management with separate privacy policies
No details on loan products, credit card terms, or competitive rate information available on homepage
Geographic eligibility not clearly specified on accessible website content
best_for: Existing credit union members seeking comprehensive digital banking solutions
Consumers prioritizing member-owned financial institutions over for-profit banks
Members requiring 24/7 remote account access and real-time transaction alerts
Individuals seeking insurance products bundled with banking services
diagnosis: SeaComm Federal Credit Union is best for existing members or eligible consumers seeking member-owned banking with comprehensive digital access, though prospective members should be aware of the current online/mobile service disruptions affecting account access availability as of March 2026. Detailed product terms, membership requirements, and rate information should be obtained directly from the institution before membership decisions.
typical_results_timeline: Membership approval and account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions are usually faster than traditional banks.
